# service/coffee/domain

> **Service Layer**

Coffee domain — composes the repository and service [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)s and
registers all MCP tools for the coffee catalog.

## Remarks

This module is the domain barrel for the coffee bounded context.  It
wires shared infrastructure ([InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../repository/coffee-repository/variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md)) into each
tool-service ([GetCoffeesService](../module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service/classes/GetCoffeesService.md), [GetACoffeeService](../module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service/classes/GetACoffeeService.md)) via
[Layer.mergeAll](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) and [Layer.provide](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/), producing a single
[CoffeeDomainLive](variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md) layer.  The [registerCoffeeTools](functions/registerCoffeeTools.md)
function then connects the fully-provided services to the MCP server
through a [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/).

## Functions

| Function                                                | Description                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| [registerCoffeeTools](functions/registerCoffeeTools.md) | Registers every coffee domain tool on the given MCP server. |

## Variables

| Variable                                          | Description                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeDomainLive](variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md) | Composed [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) providing all coffee domain services with their repository dependency already satisfied. |

## Type Aliases

| Type Alias                                                   | Description                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeDomainServices](type-aliases/CoffeeDomainServices.md) | Union of all service tags that [CoffeeDomainLive](variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md) satisfies. |
